items.title: Apple ships local container runtime
items.oneliner: Run OCI Linux containers on Apple silicon Macs with a signed native tool built on Swift.

items.title: Open document UI kit ships
items.oneliner: React components for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and CSV apps, including citations, e-signing, uploads, and schema builders.

items.title: Rust verification tool is usable
items.oneliner: Formally verify Rust code with an open-source tool built for higher-assurance systems and security-critical codebases.

items.title: Single-file messenger runs on Git
items.oneliner: This HTML-only messenger stores messages in GitHub repos, making a cloneable demo of Git-backed communication.

items.title: Safer patterns for untrusted SQL
items.oneliner: Concrete guidance for sandboxing untrusted SQL with PostgreSQL, SQLite, and DuckDB, including read-only and time-limit patterns.

items.title: Cross-browser glass effect walkthrough
items.oneliner: Hands-on CSS guide for shipping glassmorphism that stays readable and performs consistently across modern browsers.

items.title: Arabic typography rendering deep dive
items.oneliner: Interactive walkthrough of Arabic text rendering bugs, webfont fixes, and the layout edge cases most UI stacks miss.

items.title: Linux latency tuning with measurements
items.oneliner: Measure click-to-photon latency with a Teensy rig and tune compositor settings using real Linux gaming data.

items.title: Build a shading language yourself
items.oneliner: A practical compiler-building diary for creating a custom shading language that works with an offline renderer.

items.title: Implement the TTT inference algorithm
items.oneliner: Step through code for learning regular languages from examples using the TTT algorithm and reproducible experiments.
